DPO rejected pool — Molmo predictions that GPT-5 says are CORRECT

These pairs have mask_verdict=mask_ok AND molmo_verdict=yes per GPT-5 — i.e. the GT mask is correctly placed and Molmo's prediction (red dots) points at the right thing. But because F1 metric < 1.0 (small mask edge / Hungarian mismatch / multi-instance partial GT), these were put in the rejected pool used to train DPO. DPO trained on this pool pushes the policy AWAY from these correct predictions.

Total across SA-1B + Pixmo-Point: 3,640 pairs (12.3% of judged pool). Sample shown below: 30 SA-1B + 30 Pixmo-Point.
